user_query: I want to find the geocoordinates and addresses for multiple hiking trails including Grand Canyon, Yosemite National Park, and Mount Everest.

TaskList.description: Fetch the geocoordinates for Grand Canyon.
Fetch the geocoordinates for Yosemite National Park.
Fetch the geocoordinates for Mount Everest.
Fetch the human-readable address for Grand Canyon using the geocoordinates from Subtask 1.
Fetch the human-readable address for Yosemite National Park using the geocoordinates from Subtask 2.
Fetch the human-readable address for Mount Everest using the geocoordinates from Subtask 3.
